articles.title: What NVR (NVR)'s Russell Growth Inclusion and New Buyback Plan Means For Shareholders
articles.summary: In late June 2026, NVR, Inc. was added to multiple Russell Growth benchmarks, including the Russell 1000 Growth and Midcap Growth indices, while also announcing a new US$750 million share repurchase authorization.
